caption: A man with a large, grey, spiky wig, glasses, and headphones sits in a studio setting, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt and a bow tie. He is positioned behind a professional microphone. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and clothing items on hangers, including garments with "LEE" branding. A logo for "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" is superimposed on the left and right sides of the scene. Throughout the clip, the man is speaking and gesturing with his right hand, which moves from his side toward the center of the frame. His facial expressions shift slightly as he talks, maintaining a focused gaze forward. The camera remains stationary, capturing his upper body and the immediate surroundings as he engages in a conversation for the podcast.
